commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=f0883d7024959300922c7ca88d4df0b6017c86a9)
commands.review_summary:
The branch replaces the two hardcoded Anthropic OAuth `claude-cli/2.1.75` user-agent constants with a shared request-time helper that reads `@anthropic-ai/claude-code/package.json`, plus resolver unit tests.

PR surface: Source +92, Tests +75. Total +167 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the source-level failure: current main and v2026.6.9 still build both Anthropic OAuth user-agent headers from `2.1.75`. I did not run a credentialed Anthropic OAuth request, so the upstream rejection is not live-reproduced here.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Manual review is needed because the PR has a concrete dependency/compatibility blocker plus insufficient OpenClaw-path proof.

target.title: fix(anthropic): read claudeCodeVersion at runtime to prevent stale user-agent bearer auth failures
target.body:
**Fixes:** #94716 — `claudeCodeVersion = "2.1.75"` stale in two providers; every Anthropic OAuth request sends wrong `user-agent`.

> **Update 2026-06-22:** Branch squashed to single clean commit on top of upstream/main (conflict cleared). Three ClawSweeper blockers from 2026-06-19 review addressed — see section below.

---

## Root cause

Two independent stale constants, both hardcoded to `"2.1.75"`:

| File | Symbol | Code path |
|---|---|---|
| `src/llm/providers/anthropic.ts` | `claudeCodeVersion` | Legacy SDK provider (OAuth bearer) |
| `src/agents/anthropic-transport-stream.ts` | `CLAUDE_CODE_VERSION` | Managed Anthropic transport (native SSE) |

Every Anthropic OAuth-authenticated request from either path sends `user-agent: claude-cli/2.1.75` regardless of the installed Claude Code version.

---

## Changes

### `src/llm/utils/claude-code-version.ts` (new)

Single source of truth, resolved per-call via an injectable resolver:

```typescript
export type ClaudeCodeVersionResolver = () => string | null;

// Reads @anthropic-ai/claude-code/package.json at call time.
// Uses createRequire(import.meta.url) — no execSync, no module-load caching.
export const defaultClaudeCodeVersionResolver: ClaudeCodeVersionResolver = () => { … };

let resolver: ClaudeCodeVersionResolver = defaultClaudeCodeVersionResolver;
export function __setClaudeCodeVersionResolver(next: ClaudeCodeVersionResolver): void { … }
export function __resetClaudeCodeVersionResolver(): void { … }

export function resolveClaudeCodeVersion(): string { … }   // throws on any failure

// Called at client-construction time in both providers.
export function claudeCodeUserAgent(): string {
  return `claude-cli/${resolveClaudeCodeVersion()}`;
}
// CLAUDE_CODE_VERSION module-load constant REMOVED (was ClawSweeper P1 #1)
```

Design points:
- **Per-call resolution.** `claudeCodeUserAgent()` calls `resolveClaudeCodeVersion()` on every invocation. No module-load constant; a package upgrade takes effect without a runtime restart.
- **Injectable resolver.** `__setClaudeCodeVersionResolver` / `__resetClaudeCodeVersionResolver` let tests run without the host package in the module graph.
- **Fail loudly, never silently.** Null / empty / non-digit-leading / non-string / throw → exception. No fallback to a stale version.
- **Scoped package name.** `@anthropic-ai/claude-code` — not unscoped `claude` — prevents unofficial package resolution into an OAuth identity header.

### `src/llm/providers/anthropic.ts`

Remove `const claudeCodeVersion = "2.1.75"`. Import and call `claudeCodeUserAgent()` in `defaultHeaders`.

### `src/agents/anthropic-transport-stream.ts`

Remove `const CLAUDE_CODE_VERSION = "2.1.75"`. Import and call `claudeCodeUserAgent()` in `defaultHeaders`.

### `src/llm/utils/claude-code-version.test.ts` (new)

9 deterministic unit tests via resolver injection (no host package required):

| # | Test | Expected |
|---|---|---|
| 1 | resolver returns `"2.1.177"` | `resolveClaudeCodeVersion()` → `"2.1.177"` |
| 2 | resolver returns `null` | throws `/invalid value.*null/` |
| 3 | resolver returns `""` | throws `/invalid value/` |
| 4 | resolver returns `"not-a-version"` | throws `/invalid value/` |
| 5 | resolver returns `123` | throws `/invalid value/` |
| 6 | resolver throws | rethrows with `/Failed to resolve/` wrapping cause |
| 7 | resolver returns `"2.0.0-beta"` (digit-leading) | accepted as-is |
| 8 | `claudeCodeUserAgent()` reads active resolver | header matches injected version |
| 9 | resolver fails → `claudeCodeUserAgent()` throws | no stale fallback (regression for #94716) |

---

## ClawSweeper P1 blockers addressed (2026-06-19 review)

**P1 #1 — Module-load constant throws on import if `@anthropic-ai/claude-code` not in module graph:**
Resolved. `CLAUDE_CODE_VERSION` export constant removed entirely. The module no longer evaluates a resolver at import time. `claudeCodeUserAgent()` and `resolveClaudeCodeVersion()` are call-time only.

**P1 #2 — Test fixture `"v2.0.0-beta"` is non-digit-leading but validator rejects non-digit-leading:**
Resolved. Fixture corrected to `"2.0.0-beta"` (digit-leading, no `v` prefix). The validator contract and the test now agree.

**P1 #3 — Proof shows standalone Claude CLI, not OpenClaw's own provider/transport:**
Source-level proof: both call sites in `anthropic.ts` and `anthropic-transport-stream.ts` now call `claudeCodeUserAgent()`. Integration proof using the shared resolver logic against the installed global package:

```
=== claudeCodeVersion integration proof ===
package.json : C:\Users\…\npm\node_modules\@anthropic-ai\claude-code\package.json
version      : 2.1.177
user-agent   : claude-cli/2.1.177

Both providers (anthropic.ts + anthropic-transport-stream.ts) now call
claudeCodeUserAgent() at client-construction time instead of reading
the frozen build-time constant "2.1.75".
Stale bearer auth failure in #94716 is resolved.
```

Full wire capture (OpenClaw → capture server showing `user-agent: claude-cli/2.1.177` in headers) requires a dist build from this branch. Available on request.

---

## Verification

```
vitest run src/llm/utils/claude-code-version.test.ts
  Test Files  1 passed (1)
       Tests  9 passed (9)

tsc --noEmit --skipLibCheck: exit 0

node scripts/proof-claudeCodeVersion.mjs
  user-agent: claude-cli/2.1.177  ← installed @anthropic-ai/claude-code
```

Branch: single commit, squashed onto upstream/main @ `760f86453e` (2026-06-22). No conflict.
target.author: spric76

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
